title: ItemSetCreateRequest
description: Schema for ItemSetCreateRequest in Nuix REST API

query.description: Query items that should be included. If a query is not supplied it defaults to an empty string, which returns all items.

batchName.description: Defaults to date in format yy/MM/dd kk:mm:ss z

deduplication.description: How the deduplication is applied.  None returns all items matching the query including duplicates.  Other options return deduplicated items based on the deduplication methods used.  Defaults to None

custodianRanking.description: List of custodian names ordered from highest ranked to lowest ranked.  If this parameter is present and the deduplication parameter has not been specified, MD5 Randed Custodian is assumed.  If deduplication is any value other than MD5 Randed Custodian this list is ignored.
